from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.oxml.ns import qn
import os


# --- Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "esg_report.pptx"

PRIMARY_GREEN = RGBColor(46, 90, 60)
DARK_GREY = RGBColor(74, 74, 74)
MEDIUM_GREY = RGBColor(107, 107, 107)
LIGHT_GREY = RGBColor(232, 232, 232)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
ACCENT_GREEN = RGBColor(76, 175, 80)
DARK_BG = RGBColor(40, 60, 45)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Calibri"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.6)
CARD_PADDING = Inches(0.3)


# --- Helpers ---
def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background.fill
    bg.solid()
    fill_elem = bg._fill
    fill_elem.set(qn("a:solidFill"))
    srgb = fill_elem.makeelement(qn("a:srgbClr"), {qn("val"): color_hex})
    fill_elem.append(srgb)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN

SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

DARK_GREY = RGBColor(74, 74, 74)
MEDIUM_GREY = RGBColor(107, 107, 107)
LIGHT_GREY = RGBColor(232, 232, 232)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
ACCENT_GREEN = RGBColor(76, 175, 80)
DARK_BG = RGBColor(40, 60, 45)

MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.6)
CARD_PADDING = Inches(0.3)

    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background.fill
    bg.solid()
    srgb = bg._fill.find(qn("a:srgbClr"))
